caption: A man with a dark complexion and a beard is seated in a studio, wearing a black t-shirt with "CHECK IT!" printed on the chest, a black baseball cap, and a gold chain. He wears over-ear headphones and speaks into a professional microphone mounted on a stand. In the background, a white wall features a logo with "BOSS TALK 101" in large red and black lettering, alongside "HUSTLE" and a column of gold stars. On-screen graphics include a "BOSS TALK 101 PODCAST" logo on the left and a "BOSS TALK 101" logo on the right. As the sequence progresses, the man remains in a seated position, slightly shifting his head and facial expression while speaking. The lighting and setting remain constant, focusing on the subject as he engages in a podcast recording session.
